contract_claim: L1031-1031: `c.priority_score` is accessed in `format_audit_report` when sorting underdocumented concepts, but `priority_score` is not visible as a standard field of `Concept` from this file. It may be set by `_compute_priority()` which is imported only in `_deserialize_doc_prompts`. If live-run `Concept` objects don't have this attribute, sorting will raise AttributeError.
observed_behavior: Verify that `Concept` dataclass in `doc_prompts.py` always initializes `priority_score`, or that `_compute_priority` is called before any sort in the live code path.
